bugs.Test Title: Navbar Sign In button navigates to /auth/login (stays on page)
bugs.Bug Description:
Navbar Sign In button navigates to /auth/login (stays on page) — Actual: Error: locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('nav a:has-text("Sign In")')[22m

bugs.Test Title: Navbar Get Started button navigates to /auth/signup
bugs.Bug Description:
Navbar Get Started button navigates to /auth/signup — Actual: Error: locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('nav a:has-text("Get Started")')[22m

results.title: Page title renders correctly in browser tab
Page heading Welcome back is visible
Subtitle Sign in to continue to NexusAI renders below heading
NexusAI hexagon logo icon renders above heading
Form card renders with white background border and shadow
Sticky navbar is visible at the top of the page
NexusAI brand name and logo render in navbar
Navbar displays all four navigation links
Language selector button shows 🌐 EN with dropdown indicator
Navbar Sign In button is visible with outlined style
Navbar Get Started button is visible with accent fill
Email field renders with correct label and placeholder
Password field renders with correct label and placeholder
Sign In submit button renders full-width with accent background
Don't have an account? Create one free text and link render
Continue as guest (3h session) link renders at card bottom
Horizontal divider renders above guest link
Radial gradient background renders on the page
Login page renders only two form fields (Email and Password)
Email field accepts typed input and reflects value
Password field masks all typed characters
Email placeholder disappears when user starts typing
Password placeholder disappears when user starts typing
Submitting with empty Email triggers browser required validation
Submitting with empty Password triggers browser required validation
Submitting with both fields empty triggers browser required validation
Submitting invalid email format blocked by browser
Email field with @ but no domain is rejected by browser
Login has no client-side password length validation
Error state is cleared at the start of each new submission
Submit button shows Signing in... text during API call
Submit button is disabled during loading state
Submit button background changes to gray during loading
Submit button text color changes to muted during loading
Cursor shows not-allowed on submit button during loading
Successful login redirects to /dashboard
Auth tokens stored in auth store after successful login
Guest session is migrated on successful login when guestId exists
Login proceeds without error when no guest session exists
Guest migration failure does not block login or redirect
API error with message field shows that server message in error box
Fallback error message shown when API response has no message field
Error message box renders in a styled rose/red box
Error message appears above the Sign In button
Submit button reverts to Sign In and re-enables after API error
Email field retains value after a failed login attempt
Create one free link in footer navigates to /auth/signup
Continue as guest (3h session) link navigates to /chat
NexusAI logo in navbar navigates to homepage
Navbar Sign In button navigates to /auth/login (stays on page)
Navbar Get Started button navigates to /auth/signup
Navbar Chat Hub link navigates to /chat
Navbar Marketplace link navigates to /marketplace
Navbar Discover New link navigates to /discover
Navbar Agents link navigates to /agents
Email field is of type email (not text)
Password field is of type password (not text)
Both form fields have the required attribute
Form does not navigate away from page on submission (preventDefault)
Email field accepts address with subdomain format
